title: rubus × niger
intro: Rubus × niger is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Rubus armeniacus (Japanese blackberry) and Rubus fruticosus (blackberry), known for its dark purple to almost black berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus × niger include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive system function. Rubus × niger can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being.
